configurations.name: mcp-server
configurations.note: Stdio-based MCP server. Communicates over stdin/stdout — no HTTP port. Run directly by Claude Desktop via claude_desktop_config.json.

configurations.name: test-client
configurations.note: Interactive terminal client for testing all MCP tools. Spawns the server as a subprocess automatically. Use for development and tool validation.

configurations.name: test-client-snapshot
configurations.note: Quick full-system snapshot via the test client. Non-interactive — prints results and exits.
